<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kogano Shrine | native_name = 久我神社 (京都市伏見区) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kogano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.940659|135.730252}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kogano Shrine'''|久我神社 (京都市伏見区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kogano Shrine | native_name = 久我神社 (京都市伏見区) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kogano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.940659|135.730252}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kogano Shrine'''|久我神社 (京都市伏見区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Kogano Shrine
| native_name = 久我神社 (京都市伏見区)
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Kogano Shrine'''|久我神社 (京都市伏見区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kogano Shrine | native_name = 久我神社 (京都市伏見区) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kogano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.940659|135.730252}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kogano Shrine'''|久我神社 (京都市伏見区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
